node_14.excerpt: The Go compiler itself has been rebuilt with PGO enabled for 1 . 21 , and
node_14.fallbackText: The Go compiler itself has been rebuilt with PGO enabled for 1.21, and as a result it builds Go programs 2-4% faster, depending on the host architecture.

node_5.excerpt: To facilitate writing more general WebAssembly ( Wasm ) code , the compiler also supports a
node_5.fallbackText: To facilitate writing more general WebAssembly (Wasm) code, the compiler also supports a new directive for importing functions from the Wasm host: go:wasmimport .
